title: image_build_credentials
description: Schema for image_build_credentials.yml — credentials for the image_build_manager domain.

s3_access_id.description: S3 Access Key ID (required when s3_configurations.provider is 'powerscale').

s3_secret_key.description: S3 Secret Key for storage backend (MinIO password or Dell PowerScale S3 Secret Key).

provision_password.description: Password for SSH to ARM build host for aarch64 builds.
